nasb.text: Again she said to him, “We have plenty of both straw and feed, and room to lodge in.”

esv.text: She added, “We have plenty of both straw and fodder, and room to spend the night.”

cnv.text: 她又說：“我們有很多糧草和飼料，也有住宿的地方。”

ccb.text: 我家里有充足的粮草，也有地方让你留宿。”

csbs.text: 又对他说：“我们的干草和饲料都很多，也有地方让你们过夜。”
